text.title: ads-linkedin-ads Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-linkedin-ads as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Assuming Lead Gen Form field order is stable across form versions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Custom question fields are auto-keyed (e.g., question_1ab23). Field order and keys change if the form is edited. Agents must cache the field-map per form version, never assume index positions.
